fields.summary: [atsv2 read acls] REST API to list domain/domains
YARN Timeline Service v2 (post GA features)

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description:
Provide REST API to list domains and domain in TimelineReaderWebService.

/domains and /domain/\{domainId}

fields.summary: [atsv2 read acls] REST API to get domain info by id

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

status.description: This issue is being actively worked on at the moment by the assignee.
status.name: In Progress

Checkstyle warnings are due to number of params and nothing much can be done.
[~abmodi] Does writer side implementation is done?
[~rohithsharma] yes that was done as part of YARN-7933.
I am thinking should we hold this JIRA until entity acls are verified. Exposing REST API brings a feeling that acls exist end to end but its not the case.
